details.attacks: 4 x attacks (1d4 by claw or weapon)
details.special: PSI: Kinetic Shield, Kinetic Leap, ESP WT: Chameleon Power, Send Thoughts Powers: 8 Rank: 2nd Multi-arm: Tohr-kreen have four arms and can use up to four weapons at once. They receive a penalty of -1 on their attack roll if they carry any extra weapon. Paralyzing Bite: They can bite their opponents and secret a strong poison, a failed save vs paralysis causes the victim to be paralyzed for 1d6 rou

system.description:
A snake 50' long with a hard, chitinous exoskeleton. Silk wyrms are powerful predators of the Athasian wilderness.

Psionics: Kinetic Shield, Kinetic Leap, ESP WT: Chameleon Power, Send Thoughts Powers: 8 Rank: 2nd Multi-arm: Tohr-kreen have four arms and can use up to four weapons at once. They receive a penalty of -1 on their attack roll if they carry any extra weapon. Paralyzing Bite: They can bite their opponents
